default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Bridget's potential adoption of Runway for financial planning and forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrew highly recommends Runway for its scenario planning, flexible modeling, and user-specific dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Implementation requires dedicated time (est. 2 weeks part-time) but provides significant value post-setup](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Burn forecasting can be simplified by focusing on material expenses and cash timing adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Proper spend management (e.g., vendor-specific cards, budget hierarchies) complements forecasting tools](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)

## Topics

### Runway Implementation and Value

  - [Andrew implemented Runway at both Superhuman and Moonvalley](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Initial setup took \~2 weeks of part-time focus](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Key benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [Flexible modeling (retains spreadsheet-like capabilities)](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Powerful scenario planning with easy updates across scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [User-specific dashboards for controlled sharing](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Current pricing: $15-17k/year for Andrew (early adopter); Bridget quoted $24k](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

### Burn Forecasting Techniques

  - [Focus on material expenses and cash timing adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Use net operating income/loss as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Adjust for significant non-P\&L items (e.g., laptop purchases)](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [For early-stage companies, simplify by overestimating slightly for a built-in buffer](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)
  - Increase granularity as runway shortens (e.g., \<10 months left)

### Spend Management Best Practices

  - [Use dedicated vendor cards (e.g., through Brex) for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [Implement a procurement process to control spending](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Create budget hierarchies that align with P\&L structure](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2468.0)
  - [Link credit card spend and bill payments to specific budgets for real-time tracking](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)

### Transitioning from Spreadsheets

  - [Spreadsheets still useful for quick, collaborative modeling](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Runway becomes the "production environment" for official forecasts and budgets](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Export capabilities exist if needed to revert to spreadsheets](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to consider implementing Runway, potentially in August for a September start](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
  - [Review current spend management practices and consider tightening controls](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Explore budget hierarchy features in current expense management tool (Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Focus on accurately forecasting most material expenses (likely headcount) for improved burn projections](https://fathom.video/share/MkD9QxPL_yNZSrziYUhPYKZCKnQfwxw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2702.0)
